title: pouteria occidentalis
intro: Pouteria occidentalis, also known as the Sapote or Yellow Sapote, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its edible fruit and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria occidentalis include its potential to aid in weight management and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against certain diseases. Pouteria occidentalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
